rulings.Case Title: CHIA-PI TIEN VS. LEONIE ASHLEY OOSTROM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 17, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT LEONIE OOSTROM MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES GRANTED, in part and DENIED, in part. Defendant is awarded $33,926.50 in attorney's fees incurred on appeal plus $500 for fees incurred for this motion, for a total attorney fee award of $34,426.50. Defendant is awarded $888.98 in costs, including the $60 filing fee for this motion. Defendant is not entitled to the additional $60 e-service/currier fee. No opposition filed. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JIN WON JEW ET AL VS. MELE AFUHAAMANGO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 17, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT MELE AFUHAAMANGO MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENIED. CCP Section 663 is not applicable in this case and the Court finds the judgment is not void. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JENNIFER E. STRAIT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Jennifer E. Strait'S Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents And Plaintiff'S Form Interrogatories (Unlawful Detainer) And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Jennifer E. Strait In The Amount Of $285.00
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 17, 2019 line 7. PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Jennifer E. Strait'S Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents And Plaintiff'S Form Interrogatories (Unlawful Detainer) And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Jennifer E. Strait In The Amount Of $285.00 GRANTED. Defendant is required to respond to the form interrogatories without objection and produce documents within 5 days of service of the Order to compel. Plaintiff must arrange inspection and copying of documents to be done in San Francisco. Request for sanctions in the amount of $285 is DENIED. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 17, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT ERLINDA SELMA Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons DENIED, subject to opposition. This Motion is premature. Plaintiff has not filed a Proof of Service claiming proper service has been made. = (501/CFH)
